title: Cincinnati Financial Corporation Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: CINCINNATI , Aug. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cincinnati Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CINF) announced that at today's regular meeting, the board of directors declared a 75-cents-per-share regular quarterly cash dividend. The dividend is payable October 16, 2023, to shareholders of record as of September 18, 2023.

title: Why Cincinnati Financial (CINF) Might be Well Poised for a Surge
text: Cincinnati Financial (CINF) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.

title: Cincinnati Financial: Not Great RoR Yet, But A Solid Upside Here
text: Cincinnati Financial is a solid insurance company with potential for outperformance. The company is not heavily exposed to the challenging insurance market in California, making it an attractive play with little downside in terms of this market. CINF has a conservative valuation and offers a decent upside for investors, even at today's valuation, but requires moderation of expectations going forward.

title: The Ultimate 10 Retirement Salvation Dividend Aristocrats For August
text: The answer is simple for those worried about high market valuations hurting future returns. Don't buy overvalued stocks. While the average investor is at risk of a lost decade or two, smart investors buying fast-growing aristocrats trading at reasonable prices have nothing to fear. The ten dividend aristocrats are trading at a 15% discount that offers a 16% annual return potential long-term, similar to what they have delivered for 30 years.
